full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19587

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19587.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
cockpit-composer-53.1-1.0.1.el9_6.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
cockpit-composer-53.1-1.0.1.el9_6.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/cockpit-composer-53.1-1.0.1.el9_6.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[53.1-1.0.1]
- Fix Image Builder flickering [Orabug: 37252082]
- Add runner for ol8 and ol9 [Orabug: 36400619]
- Make per page documentation links point to Oracle Linux [Orabug: 32013095], [Orabug:34398922]

[53.1-1]
- New upstream release

[53-1]
- New upstream release
